value.found_quote: In this example we will deploy a simple agent to GKE. The agent will be a FastAPI application that uses `Gemini 2.0 Flash` as the LLM.
value.rationale: The page is entirely dedicated to "Deploy to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE)" and is labeled "Supported in ADK Python." It explicitly describes packaging ADK agents as containerized FastAPI applications (with a Dockerfile, main.py using FastAPI, and requirements.txt) and deploying them to a GKE Kubernetes cluster — matching the claim exactly. The page provides both manual (kubectl/gcloud) and automated (adk deploy gke) deployment paths, confirming the offering is active and generally available.
